title: Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
